focus: [D2-1/D2] /design:* generic arg-hint -> real per-mode arg grammar

graphEvents.label: All /design:* wrappers expose the same generic argument hint
sk-design registry has mode identity and aliases but no command grammar or output shape
Child mode contracts already contain target, axis, concern and output-shape inputs
impeccable command metadata ties argument hints to behavior references

label: Every /design:* wrapper exposes the same generic argument hint
enforceability: ENFORCEABLE on command corpus; PARTLY ENFORCEABLE in router replay; ADVISORY for messy runtime intent

label: Existing child mode contracts already imply real per-mode grammars
enforceability: ENFORCEABLE for docs/generated wrappers and deterministic command fixtures; ADVISORY for output quality

label: impeccable-main provides a metadata-as-source/reference-as-behavior enforcement pattern
enforceability: ENFORCEABLE on registry-command drift and router replay; ADVISORY for natural-language phrasing outside fixtures

label: A public /design:* command must expose argumentHint, usage, accepted inputs, output shape, examples and sibling discriminator without moving child mode logic into the wrapper
sk-design command wrappers are thin bridges and all use argument-hint <design request>

direction: Add prose-only reminders to the five command files
reason: The enforceable failure is metadata and wrapper drift; prose reminders would not prevent generic hints from returning
